ibm.qradar.deploy.description: This module allows for INCREMENTAL or FULL deployments

ibm.qradar.log_source_management.description: This module allows for addition, deletion, or modification of Log Sources in QRadar

state.description: Add or remove a log source.

type_id.description: Type of resource by id, as defined in QRadar Log Source Types Documentation

protocol_type_id.description: Type of protocol by id, as defined in QRadar Log Source Types Documentation

identifier.description: Log Source Identifier (Typically IP Address or Hostname of log source)

ibm.qradar.log_source_management.deprecated: Newer and updated modules released with more functionality.

ibm.qradar.offense_action.short_description: Take action on a QRadar Offense
ibm.qradar.offense_action.description: This module allows to assign, protect, follow up, set status, and assign closing reason to QRadar Offenses

status.description: One of "open", "hidden" or "closed". (Either all lower case or all caps)

assigned_to.description: Assign to an user, the QRadar username should be provided

closing_reason.description: Assign a predefined closing reason here, by name.

closing_reason_id.description: Assign a predefined closing reason here, by id.

follow_up.description: Set or unset the flag to follow up on a QRadar Offense

protected.description: Set or unset the flag to protect a QRadar Offense

ibm.qradar.offense_info.short_description: Obtain information about one or many QRadar Offenses, with filter options
ibm.qradar.offense_info.description: This module allows to obtain information about one or many QRadar Offenses, with filter options

id.description: Obtain only information of the Offense with provided ID

name.description: Obtain only information of the Offense that matches the provided name

status.description: Obtain only information of Offenses of a certain status

assigned_to.description: Obtain only information of Offenses assigned to a certain user

closing_reason.description: Obtain only information of Offenses that were closed by a specific closing reason

closing_reason_id.description: Obtain only information of Offenses that were closed by a specific closing reason ID

follow_up.description: Obtain only information of Offenses that are marked with the follow up flag

protected.description: Obtain only information of Offenses that are protected

ibm.qradar.offense_note.short_description: Create or update a QRadar Offense Note
ibm.qradar.offense_note.description: This module allows to create a QRadar Offense note

ibm.qradar.qradar_analytics_rules.short_description: Qradar Analytics Rules Management resource module
ibm.qradar.qradar_analytics_rules.description: This module allows for modification, deletion, and checking of Analytics Rules in QRadar

config.description: A dictionary of Qradar Analytics Rules options

state.description: The state the configuration should be left in The state I(gathered) will get the module API configuration from the device and transform it into structured data in the format as per the module argspec and the value is returned in the I(gathered) key within the result.

ibm.qradar.qradar_log_sources_management.short_description: Qradar Log Sources Management resource module
ibm.qradar.qradar_log_sources_management.description: This module allows for addition, deletion, or modification of Log Sources in QRadar

config.description: A dictionary of Qradar Log Sources options

state.description: The state the configuration should be left in The state I(gathered) will get the module API configuration from the device and transform it into structured data in the format as per the module argspec and the value is returned in the I(gathered) key within the result.

ibm.qradar.rule.short_description: Manage state of QRadar Rules, with filter options
ibm.qradar.rule.description: Manage state of QRadar Rules, with filter options

id.description: Manage state of a QRadar Rule by ID

name.description: Manage state of a QRadar Rule by name

state.description: Manage state of a QRadar Rule

owner.description: Manage ownership of a QRadar Rule

ibm.qradar.rule.deprecated: Newer and updated modules released with more functionality.

ibm.qradar.rule_info.short_description: Obtain information about one or many QRadar Rules, with filter options
ibm.qradar.rule_info.description: This module obtains information about one or many QRadar Rules, with filter options

id.description: Obtain only information of the Rule with provided ID

name.description: Obtain only information of the Rule that matches the provided name

type.description: Obtain only information for the Rules of a certain type

owner.description: Obtain only information of Rules owned by a certain user

origin.description: Obtain only information of Rules that are of a certain origin

ibm.qradar.rule_info.deprecated: Newer and updated modules released with more functionality.
